output.summary: Causal Oscillator LM encodes context via damped harmonic oscillator impulse responses and FFT causal convolutions before attention, sidestepping traditional transformer blocks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training; no explicit val-only regime reported.
techniques: FFT-based causal convolution of oscillator impulse responses
Attention layers operating on physics-enriched states
Muon optimizer for attention weights plus AdamW on oscillator parameters
